title: Teng Huayuan
content:
Teng Huayuan
 is the ancestor of the 
Teng Clan
 who reached the late stage of 
Nascent Soul
 before his death. Upon the death of his great grandson by 
Wang Lin
's hands, he placed a curse on Wang Lin and eventually killed all the 
Wang Clan
 members except 
Wang Zhuo
, 
Wang Hao
 and 
Fourth Uncle
.

Appearance
[
]

Personality
[
]

He is an extremely self-centered man and has absolutely no qualms about letting his relatives bully, steal from and kill others. When this backfired upon his grandson and led to his death at Wang Lin's hands, he murdered the entire Wang Clan and sealed their souls into a soul flag to bait Wang Lin out. This act of slaughtering mortals earns him some disdain even from his fellow Cultivators. He furthermore destroyed several of those souls while waiting for the then 
Foundation Establishment
 stage Wang Lin.
200 years later when Wang Lin returns as his equal, a 
Nascent Soul
 stage expert by the standards of their country and purges his Teng Clan with similar fury, he makes a final bid to pretend his will is broken to buy time until help arrives, unfortunately for him, Wang Lin simply killed him instead.
